projection_rule.degenerate_paths: Object paths with repeated sectors are recorded as tensor mass outside the Lambda^3 H6 boundary projection.
projection_rule.relation_signature_rule: Attach every C985 relation signature whose source and target sectors both lie in the d20 atom triple.
projection_rule.tensor_path_rule: For each d20 atom {a,b,c}, aggregate the six ordered C985 object-sector paths that are permutations of a -> b -> c.
